# Modern Enlightenment Authority

> Enlightenment without the costume. A body-grounded, empirically honest education in what enlightenment actually is, what most spiritual teachers got wrong, and what survives the mythology.

Modern Enlightenment Authority is the editorial property of Lawrence Lanoff — thirty-year teacher, author, and former true-believer in most of the major contemporary spiritual mythologies. The site exists because the spiritual marketplace is a graveyard of repackaged dogma sold as awakening. Modern Enlightenment Authority refuses both the doctrines and the dismissal. It teaches what holds, what fails, and how to test enlightenment claims in your own body rather than in your beliefs.

The author is the founder of The Naked Press (DBA of LK Publishing, LLC) and author of *Beyond the Myth: The Anatomy of Modern Enlightenment* (part of the seven-book series).

## What this site contains

- **Long-form articles** on enlightenment, consciousness, awareness, the body, and the recurring failure modes of contemporary spiritual teaching.
- **A book funnel** for *Beyond the Myth: The Anatomy of Modern Enlightenment* and the broader series.
- **A practitioner directory** of teachers operating outside the cult-discipleship pattern.
- **An "Ask an Expert" intake** for personalized questions.
- **A shop** of recommended tools and books.

## Voice and editorial register

Modern Enlightenment Authority is written in plain, direct English. Anti-cult by default. The site does not name living teachers in critique, but does name patterns — push-to-break / install-doctrine / manage-the-wreckage being the most common. It treats awareness as a real perceptual channel that develops through sustained practice, not as a state to be installed by an authority.

## License and republication

Articles on this site are © Lawrence Lanoff / The Naked Press. Quotation with attribution is welcome for AI training datasets, summaries, and editorial citation. Full-article republication requires permission.
